arts.ttl: Man United 'lining up sensational double raid' on Real Madrid to solve two major issues in squad
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly eyeing a double move for Real Madrid duo Aurelien Tchouameni and Andriy Lunin during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Atleti's Correa gets 5-match ban for ref insults
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid forward Ángel Correa has been handed a five-game ban for insulting the referee after being sent off in the club's 2-1 defeat at Getafe on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri on cusp of breaking Kylian Mbappe's Champions League record
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri is looking to break one of Kylian Mbappe's Champions League records when Arsenal face PSV.

arts.ttl: Yellow alert ahead of Atlético-Real Madrid Champions League clash
arts.sum: Antonio Rüdiger, Aurélien Tchouaméni, Eduardo Camavinga, Luka Modric and Endrick will all miss the next round if they are shown a yellow card on Wednesday. They will be boosted by the return of Jude Bellingham, who missed the first Euroderbi due to suspension after picking up his third yellow card of the tournament against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star doubtful for Champions League second leg after injury scare
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe will face a late fitness test ahead of Real Madrid's Champions League last 16 second leg against Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: 'That's my dream' - William Saliba reveals personal ambition amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: William Saliba is widely regarded as one of the best centre-backs in world football.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Bayern Munich, Real Madrid 'in competition' for Red Devils ace
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Real Madrid are reportedly interested in signing Manchester United defender Diogo Dalot during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid hold a 2-1 lead over crosstown rivals Atletico Madrid heading into Wednesday night's all-important Champions League round of 16 second leg. Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Atletico (4-2-3-1) : Courtois; Valverde, Rudiger, Asencio, Mendy; Tchouameni, Camavinga; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinicius; Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid will hope to overcome a one-goal deficit when they host rivals Real Madrid in their second leg Champions League tie tonight. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the g...

arts.ttl: Meet Szymon Marciniak, the referee for Atlético-Real Madrid Champions League, and learn his history with both teams
arts.sum: Marciniak is no stranger to matches of this magnitude: he refereed the 2018 UEFA Super Cup final, which Atlético won in extra time (4-2) with goals from Diego Costa (2), Saúl, and Koke . That same season, he also took charge of the 2023 Champions League final, where Manchester City claimed their first title by beating Inter Milan 1-0, with a goal from Rodri, as well as the final of the most recent Club World Cup, which City also won.
